signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% (or 2.16%), up from 2.0% in February but below market forecasts of 2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence**

This figure, confirmed via Statistics Korea data released around early April 2026, indicates contained price pressures despite Middle East energy shocks, aligning with the Bank of Korea's 2% target and its recent policy rate hold at 2.5% with
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
